title: HPU Result 2025

detail.title: HPU Result 2025
detail.short_info: HPU Result 2025: Himachal Pradesh University Result 2025 has been released on hpuniv.ac.in. Here is the direct Link to check your MD/MS Final Year Examinations Results Online.

content.text: HPU Result 2025 is out! Check your MD/MS results now on the official website hpuniv.ac.in. Get the direct link to download your HPU Marksheet 2025 here.

sections.heading: HPU Examination 2025 Final Year Examinations Result Overview
How to Check the HPU Results 2025?

content.text: Himachal Pradesh University announces its results online through the official website. To access their results, students must visit the website and locate the designated result link. Since the results are not publicly available, students are required to enter their roll number to view their individual scores.

items: Go to the official HPU website: hpuniv.ac.in.​
On the homepage, look for the “Results” or “Examination” tab and click on it.​
Find and select the relevant course and semester from the listed links (such as B.A, B.Sc, M.A, MBBS, etc.).​
Enter your Roll Number, Registration Number, or other required credentials in the provided field.​
Click the “Submit” or “View Result” button to access your result.​
Download your mark sheet and print it for your records.

sections.heading: HPU Results 2025: Direct Links to Download Final Year Examinations Result

Result gazette notification of MBBS final year Part-II (Old Syllabus) examinations held in August, 2025

Result gazette notification of Vyakarnacharya 1st year examinations held in March, 2025
